sub.title: Asa and Yuru
sub.description: In a world where certain humans command mighty supernatural duos called Daemons, it is the birthright of "the children who sunder day and night"ÔÇötwins Yuru and AsaÔÇöto rule over these powerful entities. Separated from a young age and unaware of the truth of their birth, brother and sister must fight to make their way back to each other, claim their birthright, and save the world...

sub.title: Right and Left
sub.description: Guided by Dera, Yuru flees from his pursuers and awakens the guardian deities of the village.

sub.title: Dera and Hana
sub.description: Yuru learns the truth about his village and learns the rules of modern society as he rides down the mountain.

sub.title: Jin and Yuru
sub.description: After a short rest, Yuru and his Daemons begin their search for Asa by sniffing out her blood.

sub.title: Hare and Tortoise
sub.description: Yuru and his Daemons track the scent of Asa's blood to a warehouse, where they encounter Jin and his men.

sub.title: The Kagemori Clan and the Unknown Assailants
sub.description: Yuru is reunited with Asa at the Kagemori mansion and asks her about their parents.

sub.title: Asa and Break
sub.description: The morning after the battle, Yuru asks about the eyepatch covering her right eye.

sub.title: Suspicion and Conviction
sub.description: Dera arrives at the Kagemori mansion to retrieve Yuru, and they're invited to breakfast by the clan head.

sub.title: Embrace and Whisper
sub.description: In order to cheer Yuru up, Dera drags him and his Daemons around the city to see the sights.

meta.title: Daemons of the Shadow Realm
meta.altTitle: Yomi no Tsugai;Tsugai of the Underworld Ú╗äµ│ëÒü«ÒâäÒé¼Òéñ Yomi no Tsugai; Daemons of the Shadow Realm, Yomi no Tsugai, Tsugai of the Underworld, Ú╗äµ│ëÒü«ÒâäÒé¼Òéñ, Daemons of the Shadow Realm
meta.description: In an isolated village, two twins were born, separated by day and night. It is years later, and while the older brother Yuru has become a hunter of animals, his sister Asa has been locked away in a cage, ordered to perform a special duty that prohibits her from meeting more than a few select individuals. On an otherwise inconspicuous day, a group of armed men riding in helicopters, referred to as "dragons" by the citizens, assaults the village in search of Yuru, killing every adult on sight. When Yuru attempts to meet up with Asa and flee, he finds a dead body insteadÔÇöon top of that, the person who killed her claims to be Yuru's true twin sister. Before the woman can capture him, Yuru is rescued by a man named Dera, an outsider who frequently visits the village. However, it is not long before the two are cornered. In a last-ditch effort, Dera makes Yuru give a gift to the deity of the village, summoning a pair of daemons whose existence is bound to reveal the truth behind these chaotic events.

meta.title: Yomi no Tsugai
meta.description:
In an isolated village, two twins were born, separated by day and night. It is years later, and while the older brother Yuru has become a hunter of animals, his sister Asa has been locked away in a cage, ordered to perform a special duty that prohibits her from meeting more than a few select individuals.

On an otherwise inconspicuous day, a group of armed men riding in helicopters, referred to as "dragons" by the citizens, assaults the village in search of Yuru, killing every adult on sight. When Yuru attempts to meet up with Asa and flee, he finds a dead body instead—on top of that, the person who killed her claims to be Yuru's true twin sister.

Before the woman can capture him, Yuru is rescued by a man named Ryuu "Dera" Tadera, an outsider who frequently visits the village. However, it is not long before the two are cornered. In a last-ditch effort, Dera makes Yuru give a gift to the deity of the village, summoning a pair of daemons whose existence is bound to reveal the truth behind these chaotic events.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
